name: git-diff-viewer
description: Codex plugin scaffold for reviewing Git diffs with a future local viewer.

interface.shortDescription: Review Git diffs with Codex and a local viewer.
interface.longDescription: Scaffold for a Codex plugin that will expose Git diff review tools through MCP and render review sessions in a local web viewer.
defaultPrompt: Review my working tree with Git Diff Viewer.
Create a Git Diff Viewer review session for this branch.
